title: Not made for each other: Audio-visual dissonance-based deepfake detection and localization
core_method: Detects inconsistency between audio and visual streams
key_strength: Establishes dissonance as a forensic cue
key_limitation: Does not train an interpretable attention map with a synchronization target
how_we_differ: PinPoint directly supervises audio-to-video attention structure with synchronization loss

title: Lips don't lie: A generalisable and robust approach to face forgery detection
core_method: Lip-region temporal modeling for face forgery detection
key_strength: Shows lip dynamics are robust evidence
key_limitation: Primarily visual and not full audio--visual fusion
how_we_differ: PinPoint combines mouth-region evidence with audio features and attention-based synchrony

title: Multimodaltrace: Deepfake detection using audiovisual representation learning
core_method: Audio and visual representation learning with multimodal fusion
key_limitation: Fusion does not explicitly constrain temporal attention structure

title: Temporal feature prediction in audio-visual deepfake detection
key_strength: Uses temporal consistency as a cue
key_limitation: More complex staged prediction and limited direct explanation of attention
how_we_differ: PinPoint uses a simpler attention target and multimodal XAI audit

title: Audio-visual synchronization and lip movement analysis for real-time deepfake detection
venue: International Journal of Computational Intelligence Systems
key_limitation: Uses a separate protocol and does not center attention interpretability
how_we_differ: PinPoint studies synchronization loss inside gated cross-attention and reports ablations

title: Deep residual learning for image recognition
key_limitation: Not designed for explainable multimodal forensic fusion
how_we_differ: PinPoint adapts ResNet-18 for XAI-compatible video encoding

title: Why should I trust you? Explaining the predictions of any classifier
key_limitation: Can be unstable and local only
how_we_differ: PinPoint uses LIME as one member of a larger multimodal XAI suite

title: A unified approach to interpreting model predictions
how_we_differ: PinPoint uses SHAP alongside attention and concept checks

title: Axiomatic attribution for deep networks
how_we_differ: PinPoint uses IG as an agreement check with LRP and SHAP

title: On pixel-wise explanations for non-linear classifier decisions by layer-wise relevance propagation
key_strength: Produces relevance maps for neural decisions
how_we_differ: PinPoint patches in-place operations to support relevance-style analysis

title: Interpretability beyond feature attribution: Quantitative testing with concept activation vectors
core_method: Concept activation vectors for internal representations
how_we_differ: PinPoint applies TCAV to lip-sync error concept

title: FakeAVCeleb: A novel audio-video multimodal deepfake dataset
core_method: Multimodal dataset with fake audio/video combinations
key_limitation: Dataset alone does not solve synchrony-aware explanation
how_we_differ: PinPoint uses it in a unified evaluation with synchrony supervision

title: Do you really mean that? Content driven audio-visual deepfake dataset and multimodal method for temporal forgery localization
core_method: Content-driven audiovisual forgery dataset and temporal localization method
key_limitation: Localization objective differs from interpretable detector training
how_we_differ: PinPoint uses LAV-DF for synchronized audio-video detection and explanation

title: Quantitative metrics for evaluating explanations of video DeepFake detectors
how_we_differ: PinPoint reports multimodal sparsity and consistency metrics

title: Towards quantitative evaluation of explainable AI methods for deepfake detection
how_we_differ: PinPoint integrates explanation checks with synchrony-aware architecture

title: Passive deepfake detection across multi-modalities: A comprehensive survey
core_method: Survey of passive deepfake detection across modalities
how_we_differ: PinPoint addresses a focused synchrony-aware explainability gap

title: MAVOS-DD: Multilingual audio-video open-set deepfake detection benchmark
key_limitation: Not part of current PinPoint evaluation
how_we_differ: PinPoint identifies this as future cross-dataset/open-set work

title: An integrated explainable framework for multimodal deepfake detection across image audio and video data
core_method: Integrated multimodal detection and XAI framework
key_strength: Target-venue fit for explainable multimodal deepfake work
key_limitation: Does not focus on synchronization-supervised attention
how_we_differ: PinPoint contributes a synchronization loss and detailed ablation of gated cross-attention
